channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Christian Walker agrees to $60 million, 3-year contract with Astros, AP source says
item.description: Gold Glove first baseman Christian Walker and the Houston Astros agreed Friday to a $60 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: World Series champion Dodgers top MLB luxury tax at $103 million as record 9 teams owe penalty
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers topped a record nine teams owing Major League Baseball's luxury tax this year with an unprecedented $103 million penalty, and the $97.1 million bill for the New York Mets raises their tax total under high-spending owner Steve Cohen to nearly $229 million.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Joel Embiid returns from sinus fracture to play against Charlotte
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid started for the Philadelphia 76ers against Charlotte on Friday night after missing a game because of a sinus fracture. Embiid was introduced to a roaring ovation and wore a protective “ Phantom of the Opera ” mask in his return.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL coach Jon Gruden says pass interference is 'biggest concern,' suggests cap on penalty yardage
item.description: The NFL's pass interference rule often sparks controversy, and a Super Bowl-winning coach wants the league to impose penalty yardage like college football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former NFL star Michael Vick officially hired by Norfolk State on Friday
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — Norfolk State officially named Michael Vick its head football coach Friday, the latest hire of a talented NFL player with no college coaching experience to lead an HBCU program.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trinity Rodman rips former NBA star dad for ‘joke’ apology after opening up about strained relationship
item.description: Dennis Rodman's public apology to his daughter, Trinity Rodman, was not received well by the professional soccer player, who called it a "joke" in a social media post Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers’ GM John Lynch addresses ‘confrontation’ with De’Vondre Campbell
item.description: 49ers general manager John Lynch said 49ers knew something was up with De'Vondre Campbell going into Rams game.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: West Coast recruiting: How Dickert’s departure impacts WSU; key QB pickup for OSU; Stanford dives in; USC’s gains and losses
item.description: The Cougars will have the opportunity to recruit talent that puts them at the top of the rebuilt Pac-12 -- if they hire the right coach.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck unlikely to return for College Football Playoff: report
item.description: The Georgia Bulldogs are preparing to start sophomore Gunner Stockton in place of injured star quarterback Carson Beck in the College Football Playoffs, per ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls beat Celtics 117-108 in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Towns relishes an enjoyable return to Minnesota, from the roar of the crowd to a blowout win
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns took some time to reflect on nine formative NBA seasons in Minnesota, arriving to the arena early for the morning shootaround before the rest of the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers take advantage of obscure NFL rule with free kick field goal last successful in 1976
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers pulled off the first successful free kick field goal since 1976, which was also achieved by the Chargers when they played in San diego.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brock Purdy gets his offensive line new cars for Christmas
item.description: (KRON) -- It's the most wonderful time of the year -- especially if you're a San Francisco 49ers offensive lineman. Quarterback Brock Purdy hooked the big dawgs up with brand-new Toyota cars, a video posted by the 49ers on Thursday showed.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Celtics head coach admits he'd 'rather watch something else' as NBA ratings decline
item.description: The NBA's ratings are down 25% from last season, and even Boston Celtics head coach Joe Mazzulla is part of the "problem," he admitted Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RFK Stadium site provision removed from federal spending bill, a blow to the Commanders and NFL
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A provision to transfer the land that is the site of the old RFK Stadium from the federal government to the District of Columbia is no longer included in Congress' slimmed-down, short-term spending bill that lawmakers are racing to pass before a government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 63, Coronado 39
item.description: Boys basketball action taking place at Coronado High School as the Islanders take on #4 ranked Santa Fe Christian.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: A parade, 5K and tailgate party: San Diego ramps up for Holiday Bowl
item.description: With the 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl matchup between Syracuse and Washington State just about a week away, San Diego is hosting a lineup of events leading up to the big game.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs quarterback Baker Mayfield named Offensive Player of the Week
item.description: It was announced on Wednesday that Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield has been named NFC Offensive Player of the Week.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: As Caleb Williams gains experience, Bears must find meaning in final 3 games of dismal 2024 season
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Chicago Bears continue to get the same result regardless of how they approach the assignment. Quarterback Caleb Williams looked physically and mentally beaten at the end of Monday night’s 30-12 loss to the Minnesota Vikings, the eighth straight Bears defeat.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Government funding deal opens door to move Washington Commanders stadium to DC
item.description: The Washington Commanders could soon be kicking off in the heart of the nation’s capital. The government funding deal unveiled by congressional negotiators Tuesday paved the way for moving the Commanders' stadium from Maryland to Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Tampa native named starting QB for Atlanta Falcons
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017. Coach Raheem Morris announced the decision in a statement Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cubs trade catcher Matt Thaiss to White Sox for cash considerations
item.description: The White Sox have acquired catcher Matt Thaiss from the Cubs in exchange for cash considerations, adding to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Florida Gators look to tie a bow on season in Gasparilla Bowl against Tulane
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Union Home Mortgage Gasparilla Bowl hosts the Tulane Green Wave (9-4) representing the American Athletic Conference and the University of Florida Gators (7-5) from the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Cubs trade Cody Bellinger to New York Yankees
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have traded Cody Bellinger and cash to the New York Yankees in exchange for Cody Poteet, after Bellinger won a Silver Slugger award with the North Siders in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Vucevic scores 24 points as Bulls hold off Raptors 122-121 for 4th win in 6 games
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 24 points, Coby White added 19 and the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Toronto Raptors 122-121 on Monday night for their fourth win in six games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Isaac Wilson decides to return to Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Upon second thought, Isaac Wilson is returning to Utah. Eight days after announcing he was entering the transfer portal, Wilson announced that he is returning to Utah, where will compete for the starting quarterback job with New Mexico transfer Devon Dampier.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
